common.tagline: Private PDF tools. Files stay in your browser.
common.dropFiles: Drop PDF files here or click to browse
common.upgradeDesc: No subscription. Pay once, use forever.
common.privacyNote: Your files are processed locally in your browser and never uploaded to our servers.

home.heroSub: Merge, split, compress, convert — all in your browser. First 3 documents free, then €1 lifetime access.
home.featurePrivacyDesc: Files never leave your device for basic tools

merge-pdf.title: Merge PDF
merge-pdf.description: Combine multiple PDF files into one document
merge-pdf.howTo: Select PDF files, drag to reorder, then click Merge

split-pdf.title: Split PDF
split-pdf.description: Split a PDF into separate files by page ranges

extract-pdf.title: Extract Pages
extract-pdf.description: Extract specific pages from a PDF
extract-pdf.howTo: Enter page numbers separated by commas

rotate-pdf.title: Rotate PDF
rotate-pdf.howTo: Select rotation angle and optional page numbers

reorder-pdf.title: Reorder PDF Pages
reorder-pdf.description: Change the order of pages in your PDF

compress-pdf.title: Compress PDF
compress-pdf.description: Reduce PDF file size while maintaining quality

pdf-to-jpg.title: PDF to JPG
pdf-to-jpg.description: Convert PDF pages to JPG images

jpg-to-pdf.title: JPG to PDF
jpg-to-pdf.description: Convert JPG/PNG images to a PDF document
jpg-to-pdf.howTo: Upload images and combine into PDF

annotate-pdf.title: Annotate PDF
annotate-pdf.howTo: Select annotation tool and click on the document

edit-pdf.title: Modifica PDF
edit-pdf.description: Modifica testo, disegna, aggiungi immagini e annota il PDF
edit-pdf.howTo: Carica un PDF, modifica il contenuto e scarica

pdf-to-word.title: PDF to Word
pdf-to-word.description: Convert PDF to editable Word document
pdf-to-word.howTo: Upload PDF for high-quality server conversion

pdf-to-excel.title: PDF to Excel
pdf-to-excel.description: Convert PDF tables to Excel spreadsheet

ocr-pdf.title: OCR PDF
ocr-pdf.description: Make scanned PDFs searchable with OCR
ocr-pdf.howTo: Upload scanned PDF for text recognition

form-pdf.title: PDF Forms
form-pdf.description: Create and fill PDF form fields
form-pdf.howTo: Add text fields, checkboxes, and dropdowns

sign-pdf.title: Sign PDF
sign-pdf.description: Add your signature to PDF documents

watermark-pdf.title: Watermark PDF
watermark-pdf.description: Add text watermark to PDF pages

extract-images.title: Extract Images
extract-images.description: Extract all images from a PDF
extract-images.howTo: Upload PDF and download extracted images

page-numbers.title: Add Page Numbers
page-numbers.description: Add page numbers to your PDF

flatten-pdf.title: Flatten PDF
flatten-pdf.description: Make annotations permanent in the PDF

remove-metadata.title: Remove Metadata
remove-metadata.description: Strip hidden metadata from PDF for privacy

batch-process.title: Batch Processing
batch-process.description: Process hundreds of PDFs at once
batch-process.howTo: Select operation and upload multiple files

chat-pdf.title: Chat with PDF
chat-pdf.description: Ask questions about your document with AI

paywall.title: You've used your 3 free documents
paywall.description: Unlock unlimited access for just €1 — pay once, use forever.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: PdfFlow is built with privacy first. Basic tools process files entirely in your browser.

faq.q1: Are my files uploaded to your servers?
faq.a1: For basic tools like merge, split, and compress, files are processed entirely in your browser and never uploaded.
faq.a2: Unlimited use of all browser tools plus fair-use server conversions and AI features.
faq.a3: No. Pay €1 once and use PdfFlow forever.
